name: Patient Case
history: History of family conflict with a dismissive and unsupportive father. Estrangement from the father. Ongoing stress related to partner's family, including a difficult relationship with the partner's sister-in-law.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I can't manage family relationships, I am failing.
intermediate_belief_depression: I will never have a supportive family environment.
coping_strategies: Avoiding family interactions and minimizing contact with difficult family members.
situation: Anticipating interactions with Candace during an upcoming family vacation in Maine.
auto_thought: I won't be able to handle the situation with Candace.
behavior: Avoidance of family gatherings and interactions.
